description: Map Fractional Vegetation Cover (FVC) and bare soil using the Landsat multispectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Create a virtual band named 'ndvi' using the NIR and Red bands, and a virtual band named 'fvc' using the formula ((NDVI - 0.15) / (0.85 - 0.15))^2, ensuring values are clamped between 0.0 and 1.0 using conditional logic. Additionally, create a binary virtual band named 'bare_soil_mask' where pixels with fvc == 0 or ndvi <= 0.15 evaluate to 1. Save the complete enriched product to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_fvc.dim in BEAM-DIMAP format and export the 'fvc' band as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/fvc_map.tif.
